name: fanout-review
description: List the files changed in the last commit, then DYNAMICALLY fan out one reviewer per file. Demonstrates fan_out_from: the 'review' node expands at run time to one child per non-empty line of the 'files' node output, with {{item}} = the file path.

nodes.prompt:
Review the single file {{item}} (#{{index}}) for correctness, regressions, and risk. Read only that file and what it directly imports.
## verdict
## claims
## could-not-verify
